nodes.name: To avoid Google Sheets rate limits

parameters.content: # Formatting and sending one by one

![Auto-Hunt](https://www.kawtheron.tech/github/autohunt_banner.png)

### 🎯 What this does
Pulls remote jobs from 15+ sources, dedupes against Google Sheets, and notifies you on Telegram.

**Sources:** Himalayas · FindWork · Adzuna · RemoteJobs.org · LinkedIn · JSearch · Remotive · +8 more

| Stage | Node group |
|---|---|
| 🔍 Fetch | HTTP/RSS nodes (top row) |
| 🧹 Normalize | Set + Code nodes |
| 🚫 Dedupe | Google Sheets check |
| 📬 Notify | Telegram |

main.node: To avoid Google Sheets rate limits
